LanguageData.EternalWillFallToPlanet: The following Eternal colonists will fall to the planet surface if left behind
LanguageData.EternalFellFromSpaceDesc: {0} Eternal pawn(s) fell from the grav ship and crash-landed on the planet. They survived but are severely injured. You can control them directly at the crash site or send a caravan to rescue them.
LanguageData.ClickToEnterCrashSite: Click to enter and control the Eternal(s)
LanguageData.EternalPawnDiedDesc: {PAWN_nameFull} has died. Their corpse is being tracked for potential resurrection.
LanguageData.EternalResurrectionCompleteDesc: {PAWN_nameFull} has been resurrected. They will need to repay {DEBT:F1} nutrition of biological debt accumulated during healing.
LanguageData.EternalResurrectionImmediateDesc: {PAWN_nameFull} has been resurrected without injury — no biological debt was incurred.
LanguageData.EternalPermanentDeathDesc: {PAWN_nameFull}'s accumulated food debt ({DEBT:F1}) has exceeded the maximum capacity ({LIMIT:F1}). The enormous biological cost of repeated resurrections has overwhelmed {PAWN_pronoun}'s body beyond recovery. {PAWN_nameDef} is permanently dead and cannot be resurrected again.
LanguageData.Eternal_CannotAbandonDesc: This settlement cannot be abandoned while Eternal colonists are present:
LanguageData.Eternal_CannotAbandonSuggestion: Resurrect all Eternal corpses or relocate living Eternals to a caravan before abandoning this settlement.
LanguageData.EternalSOS2ShipBurnUp: {0} Eternal pawn(s) were rescued from the burning ship and fell to the planet surface. They crashed at a rescue site and need assistance.
LanguageData.EternalSOS2ShipAbandoned: {0} Eternal pawn(s) were rescued from the abandoned ship and fell to the planet surface. They are at a crash site awaiting rescue.
LanguageData.EternalEmergencyRecovery: Eternal pawn(s) were emergency teleported to your colony after a ship destruction event.
LanguageData.EternalRoofCollapseSaved: The corpse of {0} was saved from roof collapse!
